zh.Baião, Porto, Portugal: 葡萄牙波爾圖白奧桑塔 萊奧卡迪亞
zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Soares Velho於大約1175年出生在葡萄牙法洛白奧時，她的父親D. Soeiro Nunes Velho31歲，母親D. Teresa Annes de Penella27歲。她和Pedro Nunes Ribeiro至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她埋葬在葡萄牙。

zh-hans.Baião, Porto, Portugal: 葡萄牙波爾圖白奧桑塔 萊奧卡迪亞
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria Soares Velho于大约1175年出生在葡萄牙法洛白奧时，她的父亲D. Soeiro Nunes Velho31岁，母亲D. Teresa Annes de Penella27岁。她和Pedro Nunes Ribeiro至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她埋葬在葡萄牙。

nameMeanings.name: Soares
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Luis, Francisco, Luiz, Jorge, Mario, Miguel, Pedro, Joaquin, Sergio.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Anabela, Henrique, Vasco, Agostinho, Duarte, Goncalo, Marcio, Serafim, Seraphine.
Portuguese: patronymic from the medieval personal name Sueiro, derived from Latin suarius ‘swineherd’ (see Spanish Suero ).
Spanish: northwestern variant of Suárez (see Suarez ), a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Suero
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Manuel, Fernando, Ramon, Ana, Jesus, Jorge, Julio, Luis, Orlando, Rafael.
Spanish: from the medieval personal name Suero, from Latin Suarius, from suarius ‘swineherd’, a typical nomen humilitatis (‘name as a sign of humility’) of the early Christian times.

nameMeanings.name: Velho
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Enrique, Jesus, Lino, Mario, Alvaro, Andres, Armando, Catalina, Consuelo, Fruto, Guadalupe.  Italian Antonio, Heriberto, Primo.
Galician and western Spanish: variant of Galician and Portuguese   Belo   ‘beautiful’.
Italian: habitational name from Velo d'Astico or Velo Veronese in Veneto.

variants.name: Belo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alfredo, Amalia, Armando, Emilia, Florencio, Francisca, Luiz, Nilo, Panfilo.  Portuguese Joao.
Portuguese and Galician: nickname for a handsome man (perhaps in some instances ironically for an ugly one), from belo ‘handsome’. Compare Velo and Spanish Bello .

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Soares Velho was born about 1175, in Baião, Faro, Portugal, her father, D. Soeiro Nunes Velho, was 31 and her mother, D. Teresa Annes de Penella, was 27. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Pedro Nunes Ribeiro. She was buried in Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Soares Velho est née environ 1175, à Baião, Faro, Portugal, son père, D. Soeiro Nunes Velho, avait 31 ans et sa mère, D. Teresa Annes de Penella, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Pedro Nunes Ribeiro. Elleenterrée à Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria Soares Velho um 1175 in Baião, Faro, Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater D. Soeiro Nunes Velho 31 und ihre Mutter D. Teresa Annes de Penella 27. Sie hatte mit Pedro Nunes Ribeiro mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie wurde in Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Soares Velho è nata il circa 1175 nel Baião, Faro, Portogallo, sua padre, D. Soeiro Nunes Velho, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, D. Teresa Annes de Penella, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Pedro Nunes Ribeiro. Fu sepolta a Portogallo.

ja.Baião, Faro, Portugal: ポルトガルファロベイaオ
ja.Baião, Porto, Portugal: ポルトガルポルトーベイaオサンタ レオクaディア
ja.lifeSummary: Maria Soares Velhoが約1175年にポルトガルファロベイaオで生まれた時，父D. Soeiro Nunes Velhoは31歳，母D. Teresa Annes de Penellaは27歳であった。彼女はPedro Nunes Ribeiroとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女はポルトガルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Soares Velho(이)가 대략 1175년 포르투갈 패로 베이a오에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 D. Soeiro Nunes Velho(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 D. Teresa Annes de Penella(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Pedro Nunes Ribeiro(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 포르투갈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Soares Velho nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Baião, Faro, Portugal, seu pai, D. Soeiro Nunes Velho, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, D. Teresa Annes de Penella, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Pedro Nunes Ribeiro. Ela foi sepultada em Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Soares Velho родилась около 1175 г. в местности беиaо, фаро, Португалия, её отцу по имени D. Soeiro Nunes Velho было 31 год, а матери, которую звали D. Teresa Annes de Penella, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Pedro Nunes Ribeiro. Она была похоронена в местности Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria Soares Velho nació aproximadamente 1175, en Baião, Faro, Portugal, su papá, D. Soeiro Nunes Velho, tenía 31 años y su mamá, D. Teresa Annes de Penella, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Pedro Nunes Ribeiro. Fue sepultada en Portugal.
